---
title: "IC"
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
**Source:** [`plotting/with_matplotlib/IC.py`](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/plotting/with_matplotlib/IC.py)
:::


## API Reference

### `FromBootstraps` {#frombootstraps}

```python
class FromBootstraps
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/plotting/with_matplotlib/IC.py#L7){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `FromBootstraps.plot_cdf` {#frombootstraps-plot_cdf}

```python
def plot_cdf(y, P, title=None)
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/plotting/with_matplotlib/IC.py#L9){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---
